tools.name: get_campaign_overview
tools.title: Get Campaign Overview
tools.description: Returns a high-level overview of the Paper Shoes 80 campaign — 80 marathons in 80 days across India to fight plastic pollution.

tools.name: get_runners
tools.title: Get Runners
tools.description: Returns the runners taking part in the Paper Shoes 80 campaign.

tools.name: get_five_pillars
tools.title: Get Five Pillars of Change
tools.description: Returns the campaign's Five Pillars of Change framework. Optionally filter by pillar name.

pillar.description: Optional pillar name to filter (case-insensitive substring match).
